---
title: "Natalie Smith"
image: headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 30em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/natsmith/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/plantsmith
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:nasmith@bren.ucsb.edu
---

## About me

Hi, I’m Natalie. I’m pursuing a master’s degree at the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management, where I focus on addressing climate challenges through strategic planning and data-driven solutions. With a background in music, art, and ecology, I combine creative and analytical thinking to promote resilience in both natural and urban environments.

## Recent and Ongoing Projects

[Evaluating Ecological Conservation Gaps Across a Proposed Sentinel Landscape (Connectivity Analysis)](https://bren.ucsb.edu/projects/evaluating-ecological-conservation-gaps-across-proposed-sentinel-landscape)

[Mapping Heat-Risk Inequalities in Los Angeles County](https://plantsmith.shinyapps.io/heat_risk_inequality/)

[Quantifying the Value of Wetland Restoration](https://plantsmith.quarto.pub/natalie-smith/portfolio/benefits_transfer/)

[Tradeoffs of Green Investing](https://plantsmith.quarto.pub/natalie-smith/portfolio/green_investing/)

## Professional Interests

Climate Adaptation \| Urban Biodiversity \| Resilient Landscapes \| Environmental Planning \| Environmental Justice \| Nature Based Solutions \| Sustainability \| Built Ecology \| Connectivity

## Skill Sets

Ecology \| Data Science \| GIS \| R Programming Language \| Excel \| Native Plant ID \| Project Management \| Communication \| Stakeholder Engagement \| GHG Accounting

##
